title: Rarity trading legacy protection and digital convergence platform
abstract: A trading platform network for rarities is provided. The network includes at least one raritymine, an online merchandising convergence, and input from a robo-rarity trading data stream. According to this aspect, rarityminers are enabled to view virtual three-dimensional depictions of rarity assets contained in the at least one raritymine and buy and sell raritybits. A rarities trading exchange toolkit which includes the trading platform network and a rarity system is also provided.
claims:
Claims 1 . A trading platform network for rarities comprising at least one raritymine, an online merchandising convergence, and input from a robo- rarity trading data stream, wherein rarityminers are enabled to view virtual three-dimensional depictions of rarity assets contained in the at least one raritymine, and buy and sell raritybits. 2. The network for rarities of claim 1 wherein the robo-rarity trading data stream is configured to provide rarityminers with a portfolio of information regarding one or more of the raritymine assets automatically and in real time. 3. The network for rarities of claim 1 wherein the network further comprises rarities exchange software. 4. The network for rarities of claim 1 wherein the network is configured to operate as a peer-to-peer network. 5. The network for rarities of claim 1 wherein the network is configured to operate as a friend-to-friend network. 6. The network for rarities of claim 1 wherein the network further comprises rarities physical tracking and safety software, a digital transactional communication interface and controls, navigation and operational guidelines configured to facilitate rarity trading. 7. The network for rarities of claim 1 wherein the network further comprises software configured to provide one or more of financial analysis, rarity logistics, specialty asset nodules, or raresearcher input. 8. The network for rarities of claim 1 wherein the network is further configured to be useable by a rarityminer in a practice mode. 9. An online merchandising convergence comprising a virtual merchandising mart wherein a virtual three-dimensional depiction of one or more rarity assets included in a raritymine are configured for visualization by sellers and buyers of raritybits in the raritymine. 10. The online merchandising convergence of claim 9 further comprising one or more Internet showcases wherein an owner of a raritybit 

 can virtually display a three-dimensional image of the one or more rarity assets for which the raritybit represents an ownership interest. 1 1 . The online merchandising convergence of claim 10 wherein the one or more Internet showcases are configured to be customizable by the owner of the raritybit to facilitate its presentation. 12. The online merchandising convergence of claim 9 wherein the convergence is connected to a controller with the capacity to configure the mart based on one or more of optimization of buyer-seller traffic, scale, type of asset, rarity value, rarity size, asset popularity, asset demand, information complexity, historical references, search engine, number of fractional share buyers, or analytics. 13. The online merchandising convergence of claim 9 wherein the virtual three-dimensional depiction further comprises a holographic image. 14. The online merchandising conveyance of claim 9 wherein the virtual three-dimensional depiction further comprises one or more of action, sound, smell, taste, touch or combination of two or more of these or other sensory depictions. 15. The online merchandising convergence of claim 9 wherein the virtual three-dimensional depicture further comprises action-oriented depictions of one or more of the rarity assets. 16. The online merchandising convergence of claim 9 wherein the virtual merchandising mart is a depiction of a fine arts gallery or other artistic showcase. 17. The online merchandising convergence of claim 9 wherein the virtual merchandising mart is a garage or other showcase of collectible vehicles. 18. The online merchandising convergence of claim 9 wherein the virtual merchandising mart is an auction house or other showcase of stamps, coins or similar collectibles. 19. A robo-rarity trading support system comprising a smart data compiler configured to data stream information for use by a rarityminer to evaluate rarity assets or rarity asset pools in a raritymine. 20. A rarities trading exchange toolkit comprising a trading platform network and a rarity system. 21 . The rarities trading exchange toolkit of claim 20 wherein the rarity system comprises a software control system configured to authenticate and certify rarity assets included in a raritymine. 22. The rarities trading exchange toolkit of claim 20 wherein the rarity system further comprises a placement or use of one or more creator's genetic information within or upon the rarity asset to enhance identification of originality or authenticity of the rarity asset. 23. The rarities trading exchange toolkit of claim 20 wherein the rarity system comprises a software control system configured to provide one or more of the functions of tagging, tracking, logging data regarding rarity assets included in a rarity mine. 24. The rarities trading exchange toolkit of claim 20 wherein the rarity system comprises a software control system configured to provide one or more of the functions of facilitating secure communications among network participants, facility streamlining of seller-buyer transactions in raritybits, permeate smart particles and materials, enter secure data points and data sets which assist in protecting and securing, and facilitate storage of rarity assets which are included within the one or more raritymines. 25. A raritybit having the capacity to be bought and sold in fractional shares over a set period of asset holding time. 26. The raritybit of claim 25 having the capacity to be self- managed. 27. The raritybit of claim 25 having the capacity to be sold by subsequent owners over a period of time. 28. The raritybit of claim 26 having the capacity to be sold by subsequent owners over a period of time. 29. The raritybit of claim 25 having the capacity selected from one or more of being self-managed, bought and sold as whole assets over a set period of asset holding time, and bought and sold as whole assets and subsequently sold by subsequent owners over a period of time. 30. The raritybit of claim 25 wherein the raritybit comprises an asset which is a restricted or control security.
